reviews.comment:
Fui a canjear un matafuegos para realizar la VTV por un aviso en Mercado Libre, no sabía que era en el ACA Palermo, el aviso no lo dice. La observaciones en la nota de revisión de la VTV, aparece como matafuegos vencido, no sirve.
Soy socio del ACA, lo llevé en dos oportunidades al taller mecánico, en la segunda, para antes de irme de vacaciones a Tucumán Lo dejé para que revisaran toda la parte de distribución, a mí regreso, me quedé a 100 Kms. De Tucumán, el ruleman del tensor de correa de distribución se engranó, nunca se hicieron cargo de nada.

(Translated by Google)
I went to exchange a fire extinguisher for the vehicle inspection (VTV) after seeing an ad on Mercado Libre. I didn't know it was at the ACA Palermo (Automobile Club of Argentina) because the ad didn't mention it. The inspection report states the fire extinguisher was expired and therefore unusable.
I'm an ACA member, and I took my car to the mechanic twice. The second time, before going on vacation to Tucumán, I left it there to have the timing belt checked. On my way back, I broke down 100 km from Tucumán, and the timing belt tensioner bearing seized. They never took responsibility for anything.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURVLUszUzZRRRAB

Es del automóvil club argentino.la atención es buena los baños siempre limpios y me queda de paso

(Translated by Google)
It belongs to the Argentine Automobile Club. The service is good, the bathrooms are always clean, and it's conveniently located for me.
